description.en: Attacks an enemy and increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自分の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使自身的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1\n回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nReduces one target's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> when attacking. This effect ignores the target's <color=#28d9ed>Resilience</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n공격 시 대상 한 명의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-5%</color> 감소시킵니다. 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 저항</color>을 무시하고 효과가 적용됩니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n攻撃時、対象単体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-5%</color>DOWNさせる。対象の<color=#28d9ed>効果抵抗</color>を無視して効果が適用される。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n攻击时,使1个目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>-5%</color>。该效果无视目标的<color=#28d9ed>效果抵抗</color>。
